source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local synthesis surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
distilled_thesis: This bounded synthesis reads the departure from homeland and lake as a leaving of reflective origin, turning the opening movement into a source-linked interpretive break from mirrored beginning.
